description_long: This chaise features a sleek, rectangular form with a rich brown leather or leather-like upholstery, giving it a modern and sophisticated appearance. The seat is long and flat, supported by four short, tapered wooden legs, and the base is accented with a wood grain panel along the lower edge. Both ends of the chaise are framed by blocky armrests, each accompanied by a cylindrical bolster cushion that matches the upholstery. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a high-quality finish. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative stitching or tufting. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, upscale public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, brown leather-upholstered chaise with blocky armrests, cylindrical bolster cushions, and a wood-accented base, supported by short tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the chaise, both armrests, and the two cylindrical bolster cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blocky armrest, the thickness of the seat, and the cylindrical bolster cushion at one end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite armrest and bolster cushion, as well as the wood-accented base.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, again showing the armrest and bolster cushion, with the same seat thickness and leg style.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no traditional backrest; instead, each end of the chaise features a blocky, rectangular armrest that rises to the same height as the seat, with a cylindrical bolster cushion resting against it.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both ends, designed as solid, rectangular blocks integrated into the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, made of wood with a smooth finish and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid brown with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two cylindrical bolster cushions, one at each end of the chaise, positioned against the armrests; the main seat cushion is a single, flat, integrated piece.
